tips_en: First read Intern‑Atlas because it builds a method‑level evolution graph that captures the causal development of AI techniques, giving you a meta‑view that situates the other two papers. Then dive into UniVidX, whose cross‑modal self‑attention and LoRA designs provide a concrete illustration of multimodal integration aligned with the idea‑level reasoning in Intern‑Atlas. Finally, read ProDa to see how test‑driven data engineering with structured knowledge extraction parallels the causal knowledge chains used in Intern‑Atlas.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 Intern‑Atlas，因为它构建了方法级演化图，捕捉 AI 技术的因果发展，提供了一个将其他两篇论文定位的元视角。随后深入 UniVidX，其中的跨模态自注意力与 LoRA 设计展示了与 Intern‑Atlas 的思路相吻合的多模态融合。最后阅读 ProDa，了解测试驱动数据工程与结构化知识抽取如何对应 Intern‑Atlas 中的因果知识链。
